title: Life Stage Living Room
description: A reference-dependent mirror-world series: one age-spectrum character sheet followed by three same-person time-collage compositions in a shared living-room world.
creative_direction: Image 01 locks the protagonist's identity across eight life stages. Images 02-04 use that reference to place the same person at different ages into simultaneous rooms, mirrors, and seasonal time loops while preserving facial structure and signature details.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Life Stage Living Room
en.description: One age-spectrum character sheet expands into three same-person mirror-world compositions.

zh-CN.title: 人生阶段客厅系列
zh-CN.description: 一张年龄谱角色参考图扩展成三张同一人物跨时空同框构图。
